generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded our local preparedness programs are. While some argue for cutting these budgets, I've worked with experts who confirm that even modest investments in community resilience pay off during crises. We're talking about basic training, supply caches, and coordination - not some expensive military hardware. Our neighbors in [State] saw this work during the 2024 floods. Why aren't we prioritizing this common-sense protection? #CivilDefenseMatters #CommunitySafety
